# ResponseCache&lt;T&gt;.InvalidateByNotification method

Evicts all entries for every method that maps to *notification*, including all paginated-cursor-page entries (keys equal to `method` or prefixed `method::`). (RC-9)

```csharp
public void InvalidateByNotification(string notification)
```

| --- | --- |
| notification | The change notification method name. |
